response.original_title: Suplemento de informaciones cinematográficas de El Tiempo
response.overview: It contains: Fashion Today (exhibition of the latest Parisian fashion models, received by Maison Grimaux); Local Progress (Lima's grand avenues); Machu Picchu (panoramic view of the pre-Incan city); Our Cartoonist in Action (Peru's Values); Social Album; Humorous Note; Artistic Photography ("Sunset"); Architectural Lima; The Current Event: Arrival in Lima of the President-elect of the United States, Mr. Hoover.
response.title: Suplemento de informaciones cinematográficas de El Tiempo
